features: Nail Enamel Dryer is the professional manicurist's finishing spray for natural and artificial nail applications.
description: Product description Demert Nail Enamel Dryer Finishing Spray with dl-Panthenol Organic Protein & Mink Oil. Fast drying, non-smearing. Saves time, no need to do nails over. Conditions cuticle and nails. Directions: Hold can upright, at least four inches from nail. Spray once lightly over each nail. Repeat as necessary. Directions Spray each nail and repeat as needed for a quick dry, streak-free manicure. This nail polish dryer contains organic mink oil dl-panthenol protein, which conditions cuticles and nails while drying nail polish. No need to do your nails when you can use this quick nail polish dryer which also prevents smudging.
